Landing.eyebrow: Exclusive Monetization Platform for Dental Clinicians
Landing.hero_title:
You Set the Price.
Monetize Your Clinical Cases
Landing.hero_sub_1: Set your own price for your clinical cases.
Landing.hero_sub_2: Earn revenue automatically whenever a colleague watches.
Landing.uc_dz_text: Drag and drop or select your case video
Landing.uc_done_sub:
AI Quality check started.
Reward will be confirmed in 48h.
Landing.uc_price_sub: Earnings per view · Viewers will pay this price
Landing.flow_desc: Passive income starts the moment you upload your case and set the price.
Landing.flow_s1_d: Select a video and input metadata like category and difficulty.
Landing.flow_s2_d: Decide the value of your case. Freely set the price between 0~10,000 RAB.
Landing.flow_s2_r: Key: You have the pricing power
Landing.flow_s3_d: AI automatically reviews within 48h. Earn 10~30 RAB upload reward based on Gold/Silver/Bronze tier.
Landing.flow_s4_d: Your account is instantly credited whenever another dentist watches (platform fee excluded).
Landing.flow_s5_d: Your revenue grows exponentially as cases stack. RAB can be purchased and later exchanged.
Landing.calc_title:
How Much Can I Earn
With My Cases?
Landing.calc_pur_stripe_warn_title: Under Stripe Minimum Payment Amount ($10.00 USD)
Landing.calc_pur_stripe_warn_desc: Due to credit card payment gateway policies, checkout sessions can only be created for $10 USD or more. (Minimum 1,500 RAB recommended)
Landing.calc_pur_stripe_ok_desc: As it is 1,500 RAB ($10.00 USD) or more, you can immediately create a checkout session for payment.
Landing.calc_pur_formula_desc: To eliminate discrete step changes, we apply mathematical Linear Interpolation from 1 RAB (30.0%) to 10,000 RAB (50.0%), gradually increasing per token for perfectly fair transactions.
Landing.rd_d1: After your case is uploaded and passes AI quality checks, the reward is confirmed in 48 hours. Get a base of 10 RAB and up to 20 RAB bonus based on quality score.
Landing.rd_d2: Whenever another member watches your case, the price you set (minus platform fee) is instantly credited to your account. Build passive income as cases accumulate.
Landing.rd_d3: Earn 1 RAB instantly every time your case receives a like. High-quality cases naturally gather more likes for extra profit.
Landing.rd_d4: A final quality score is calculated after 48h reflecting view completion rate and like ratio. Gold (+20), Silver (+14), or Bronze (+6) bonuses are paid accordingly.
Landing.tier_desc: Your tier is decided by AI score (50 pts) and 48-hour community response (50 pts).
Landing.pol_title:
What to Upload
What Not to Upload
Landing.pol_c1_d: Professional dental case videos. As long as it's educational and shareable.
Landing.pol_c2_d: Content violating privacy or platform trust will be made private immediately.
Landing.pol_c3_d: Restrictions to ensure a fair system. Anti-abuse mechanisms are built-in.
Landing.ai_desc: Google Cloud Functions automatically analyze videos upon upload. Complete within 48 hours without human intervention.
Landing.ai_p2_d: Length extraction via ffprobe, MD5 dup check
Landing.faq_q1: When do I receive RAB after uploading?
Landing.faq_a1: RAB is reserved as 'pending' immediately. It is confirmed and paid 48 hours after passing the AI quality check. You can check your pending RAB in your points history.
Landing.faq_q2: What happens if I fail the AI check?
Landing.faq_a2: Failed cases are automatically set to private. You won't receive the upload reward, and repeated violations may lead to penalties. Detailed reasons are provided via notifications so you can edit and re-upload.
Landing.faq_a3: Google Vision API automatically detects and blocks videos with exposed human faces. Plus, all cases are set to 'Members Only' by default, meaning only verified dentists can watch.
Landing.faq_q4: Is there a limit on monthly uploads?
Landing.faq_a4: Rewards are given for up to 10 cases per month. Extra cases will be public, but their rewards roll over to the next month. This prevents abuse and manages token supply. Limits will expand based on future subscription tiers.
Landing.faq_q5: How can I use RAB tokens?
Landing.faq_a5: Currently, RAB is used to watch cases based on the uploader's price, and you can recharge it with cash. It will soon be used for downloads and boost promotions. Cash withdrawal and real blockchain token swaps are planned.
Landing.faq_q6: What do I need to sign up?
Landing.faq_a6: You can sign up using your dental license number, email, clinic name, and region. Only verified dental practitioners can join. You'll instantly receive a 50 RAB welcome bonus to get started completely free.
Landing.cta_desc:
Sign up for free, upload your first case, and set your price.
Revenue accumulates automatically with every view.
Landing.cta_note: Verified by License · Forever Free · Custom Pricing ·
Landing.foot_desc: Premium clinical case knowledge sharing & monetization platform for dental clinicians.
